Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface IProgramVariable

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProofIrrelevancy, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, ModelElement, Named, Operator, Operator, ProgramElement, Sorted, SortedOperator, SourceElement, SyntaxElement, TerminalProgramElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
LocationVariable, ProgramConstant, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable
public interface IProgramVariable extends TerminalProgramElement, Named, SortedOperator, Operator
